title: FirePilot Security Rule
description: JSON Schema for {name}.yaml security rule files (ADR-0007). Field names are taken verbatim from the Palo Alto Networks SCM API (ADR-0004) — no aliases, no abstraction. Fields 'id', 'folder', and 'position' are intentionally absent: they are forbidden in rule files because they are derived from the directory structure and assigned by SCM, respectively. 'additionalProperties: false' enforces this constraint.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Must be 1. FirePilot metadata — not sent to SCM API.

name.description: Rule name. Must match the filename (without .yaml extension) and the SCM rule name. Characters: a-zA-Z0-9, space, hyphen, underscore, period. Max 63 chars.

from.description: Source security zone(s). At least one zone required.

to.description: Destination security zone(s). At least one zone required.

source.description: Source address(es) or address object names. Use ['any'] if unscoped.

source_user.description: Source user(s) or user group(s). Use ['any'] if unscoped.

destination.description: Destination address(es) or address object names. Use ['any'] if unscoped.

service.description: Service(s) being matched. Use ['application-default'] for application-defined ports.

application.description: Application(s) being matched. Use ['any'] for all applications.

category.description: URL categories. Use ['any'] if category filtering is not required.

action.description: Rule action. Values taken verbatim from the SCM API enum.

tag.description: Tag(s) applied to the rule. Must include 'firepilot-managed' (enforced by OPA Gate 2). Additional tags are permitted for application or team attribution.

disabled.description: Whether the rule is disabled in the rulebase. Defaults to false.

negate_source.description: Negate the source address match. Defaults to false.

negate_destination.description: Negate the destination address match. Defaults to false.

schedule.description: Schedule name restricting when the rule is active. Optional.

group.description: Security profile group name(s) to apply.

log_setting.description: External log forwarding profile name. Optional.

log_start.description: Log at session start. Optional, defaults to false.

log_end.description: Log at session end. Optional, defaults to true.

policy_type.description: Policy type. Defaults to 'Security'. Omit unless non-default.
